extractedFrom.notes: Source of truth is the in-memory mock, not a drift table. Entity StaffMember declared lines 14-26; roster ValueNotifier kStaff seeded with 2 members (Excel Okafor/Owner/isOwner, Chiamaka Udo/Cashier) lines 30-42; seatCapForPlan(plan) lines 47-50 (delegates to billing limitsFor(plan).staffSeats, -1 unlimited -> 99); const _roles (4 display roles: Manager/Cashier/Recovery Officer/Sales Representative) lines 52-57. Invite mutation appends to kStaff lines 229-236. StaffPermissionsScreen (deactivate/remove + granular perms) is OUT OF SCOPE (owned by staff-permissions agent).
extractedFrom.supersedeNote: S-4 collapses the granular per-permission matrix and free-text role labels (Owner/Cashier/Manager/...) to a coarse two-role model role = owner | staff. Per-permission flags (kStaffPerms) are NOT extracted. As-built isOwner boolean maps to role=owner; every non-owner member maps to role=staff.

entity.name: Staff
entity.asBuiltFields: name, phone, role (free-text display label), isOwner (bool)

targetFields.name: id
targetFields.note: client-minted UUIDv7 per conventions/S-2; no id on the as-built mock (roster keyed by phone/list index)

targetFields.name: phone
targetFields.note: primary natural key in the mock; digits only (invite strips non-digits, requires >=10)

targetFields.name: role
targetFields.note: coarse enum owner|staff per S-4 (collapses as-built free-text roles + isOwner)

targetFields.name: active
targetFields.note: seeded members are active; invite creates active; deactivate (staff-permissions screen) removes/flips to inactive. As-built has no explicit flag — modelled as active status.

filtersOrSort: owner rendered first with 'You' badge; staff count = members where role != owner
reads.note: Rendered from kStaff ValueNotifier (all members for the business). Empty (solo) state when non-owner count == 0.

fields.name: plan
fields.note: canonical plan id from repo.watchBusiness()/getBusiness().plan via canonicalPlanId

fields.name: seatCap
fields.note: derived seatCapForPlan(plan) = limitsFor(plan).staffSeats: market 1, business 5, enterprise unlimited (-1 -> 99); starter 0

reads.note: Derived seat-cap display ('$staff of $cap staff seats used on $plan') and the invite gate (seatsLeft = cap - used). Not a stored entity — plan comes from the business, cap from billing limitsFor(plan).staffSeats.

actions.name: inviteStaff

payload.name: phone
payload.note: digits only, >=10 required; the only field the invite sheet collects

payload.name: role
payload.note: coarse owner|staff per S-4; as-built defaults to _roles.first and lets owner pick a display role — collapse to staff

payload.name: name
payload.note: as-built auto-generated placeholder ('Invited · <phone>') until the invitee sets it; conceptually part of the Staff record

actions.note: As-built appends a StaffMember to kStaff in memory and shows a snackbar. Gated by seat cap: when seatsLeft <= 0 the invite CTA is replaced by a 'See plans' upgrade path (no invite fired). Send button disabled until phone has >=10 digits.

actionsOutOfScope.name: deactivateStaff
actionsOutOfScope.reason: Deactivate/remove staff is fired from StaffPermissionsScreen (kStaff.value filtered by phone, lines 513-516), which is owned by the staff-permissions agent. Not extracted here.

authContext.note: Per conventions only owner manages staff (staff role cannot manage staff). Screen is owner-facing; the current user is the owner (isOwner member = 'You').

special.planGateNote: Staff count gated by plan seat limits (seatCapForPlan): starter 0, market 1, business 5, enterprise unlimited. Exceeding the cap blocks invite and routes to upgrade — backend should enforce (PLAN_REQUIRED 403 per conventions).

uiStatesHandled: empty-solo (non-owner count == 0 -> 'It's just you for now' empty state)
populated-list (owner + staff rows with role pill)
seat-cap-usage-caption ('$staff of $cap staff seats used on $plan')
seat-limit-reached (seatsLeft <= 0 -> upgrade nudge banner + 'See plans' CTA replacing invite)
invite-form-validation (Send invite disabled until phone digits >= 10)
